items.name: scada
items.title: Industrial Control Interface (SCADA Desktop System)
items.description: Desktop application for interacting with PLC systems via Modbus in real-time environments. Focused on reliable command execution, system latency and safe industrial-like control flows.

items.name: plc-gateway
items.title: Real-Time PLC Data Gateway
items.description: Web-based system for monitoring and interacting with PLC data using Node.js and Next.js. Designed around polling-based real-time constraints and controlled industrial data access.

items.name: automation
items.title: Industrial Automation Systems Design
items.description: Design of industrial automation systems including control logic, equipment sizing, PLC integration and monitoring architectures in real production environments.

items.name: robotics
items.title: Industrial Robotics Control Systems
items.description: Robotic automation workflows for classification and palletizing using industrial robotic systems. Focus on motion logic and industrial execution reliability.

items.name: pi-system
items.title: Industrial Data Platform (AVEVA PI System)
items.description: Configuration and management of industrial time-series data systems for real-time monitoring, calculation and operational visibility.

items.name: ignition
items.title: SCADA Application Development (Ignition)
items.description: Industrial HMI/SCADA applications built with Ignition Perspective, including Python scripting, database integration and UI optimization for operations.

items.name: web
items.title: Full-Stack Software Systems
items.description: Backend and frontend system development using Node.js, Next.js and databases (MongoDB, MySQL). Focus on APIs, real-time communication and system design.

items.name: ai
items.title: Applied AI Systems
items.description: Machine learning models using TensorFlow/Keras for classification and prediction tasks based on real datasets.

items.name: ai-lab
items.title: AI Experimentation Lab
items.description: Experimental development using AI-assisted coding tools such as Cursor and Claude Code to explore agent-based workflows.

items.name: embedded
items.title: Embedded & IoT Systems
items.description: Low-level embedded development and IoT systems using microcontrollers, sensor integration and hardware-software interaction.

items.name: excel-vba
items.title: Process Automation Tools (Excel VBA)
items.description: Automation tools for industrial reporting, tracking systems and operational data processing using Excel macros.

items.name: gamedev
items.title: Game Development (Exploration)
items.description: Experimental 2D/3D game development in Unity using C# for gameplay logic, animation and physics systems.

items.name: blockchain
items.title: Smart Contracts & Blockchain Systems
items.description: Ethereum smart contract development for asset tokenization and decentralized application logic.

items.name: desktop-apps
items.title: Desktop Engineering Tools (Windows)
items.description: Windows desktop utilities for monitoring, conversion, networking and operational support tasks.
